MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-19-2024 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. DANIEL DE SOTO, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. ERIN MCGAHEY, ESQ. IS SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS AND CROSS-DEFENDANTS VIA COURTCALL WHO HAVE NOT APPEARED ON THE CASE. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/20/24 IS CONTINUED TO 10/14/24 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY TRACKS THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ANY FURTHER CONTINUANCES SHALL BE BY NOTICED MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND MOVING PARTY NEEDS TO DOWNLOAD THE ORDER AND SERVE ON ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206) ***COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, RAYMOND ROLLAN, ESQ., APPEARED LATE FOR THE HEARING. MOTION WAS HEARD.***
